test_cases.title: Sums even integers in a mixed list
test_cases.description: Given a list with both even and odd integers, sum_even returns the sum of only the even values.

test_cases.title: Returns zero for an empty list
test_cases.description: Given an empty list, sum_even returns 0.

code.change_reason: Empty-list assertion grouped into the same module.

test_infrastructure.change_reason: Declares test-only dependencies installed by the runner before pytest.

test_infrastructure.content: # Shared fixtures for the even-sum test suite.

assumptions_made.description: AC-003 (type rejection) is left uncovered this run because the interface manifest does not specify which exception type is contractually guaranteed.
